tasks.title: Check e-mail
tasks.description: Start your day with seeing what's going on
tasks.detailDescription: Start by scanning your inbox for production alerts, deployment notifications, incident reports, code review requests, and blocked dependencies. Prioritize anything affecting systems, users, or team delivery. Flag actionable items and ignore low-priority noise until core issues are handled.
